context: Tests whether EventKit alarm guidance preserves the boundary between Calendar/Reminders alarms and app-owned UserNotifications or push-notification workflows.

checklist.name: EventKit alarms
checklist.description: Recommends attaching native alarms to calendar events or reminders when the alert belongs to the calendar/reminder item.

checklist.name: Event alarms
checklist.description: Mentions relative or absolute EventKit event alarms and adding them to the event.

checklist.name: Location reminders
checklist.description: Mentions structured-location reminder alarms when the reminder is triggered by entering or leaving a place.

checklist.name: Notification handoff
checklist.description: Hands app-owned local or remote notifications to the UserNotifications or push-notifications layer instead of expanding EventKit into APNs guidance.

checklist.name: No push conflation
checklist.description: Does not claim that native EventKit calendar or reminder alarms require app push-notification authorization.
